mission.title: Install and Configure Carina on Kubernetes
mission.description: Carina is a high-performance, ops-free local storage solution for Kubernetes, designed to simplify storage management for cloud-native databases. Installing Carina allows you to leverage Kubernetes-native storage resources while benefiting from low-latency and efficient storage capabilities.

steps.title: Install Carina CSI driver via kubectl
steps.description:
Deploy Carina from the official release manifests:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carina-io/carina/main/deploy/kubernetes/release.yaml
```
Or use Helm if available from the project:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/carina-io/carina.git
cd carina
kubectl apply -f deploy/kubernetes/
```

steps.title: Configure storage classes
steps.description:
Create a StorageClass for Carina:
```bash
kubectl apply -f - << 'EOF'
apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
  name: carina-lvm
provisioner: carina.storage.io
parameters:
  carina.storage.io/disk-type: lvm
reclaimPolicy: Delete
volumeBindingMode: WaitForFirstConsumer
EOF
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n carina
kubectl get storageclass | grep carina
kubectl get csidrivers | grep carina
```

uninstall.title: Remove Carina
uninstall.description:
```bash
kubectl delete -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carina-io/carina/main/deploy/kubernetes/release.yaml
kubectl delete storageclass carina-lvm
```

troubleshooting.title: CSI driver not registering
troubleshooting.description:
Check the CSI node plugin DaemonSet:
```bash
kubectl get ds -n carina
kubectl logs -l app=carina-node -n carina
```

troubleshooting.title: PVC stuck in Pending
troubleshooting.description:
Verify the StorageClass and available local disks:
```bash
kubectl describe pvc <name>
kubectl get nodes -o wide
```

troubleshooting.title: LVM volumes not created
troubleshooting.description:
Check that LVM is installed on worker nodes and physical volumes are available:
```bash
sudo pvs
sudo vgs
```

resolution.summary: Carina CSI driver is installed for providing local storage management on Kubernetes.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and have installed Helm and kubectl.
